mapper.select: SELECT SCHED_ID , USER_ID , TITLE , SCHED_DATE , SCHED_CONTENT , CATEGORY , IS_COMPLETED , CREATE_DATE FROM SCHED WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY SCHED_DATE DESC
SELECT SCHED_ID , USER_ID , TITLE , SCHED_DATE , SCHED_CONTENT , CATEGORY , IS_COMPLETED , CREATE_DATE FROM SCHED WHERE SCHED_ID = #{schedId}
